title: 8 Herbal Creams For Eye Infection
description: Cinchona officinalis creams contains the active constituents quinine and alkaloids, which are known for their antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. These properties help to reduce redness and swelling in the eyes, making it an effective treatment for eye infections. Quinine also has antimicrobial properties, which help to fight off bacterial and viral infections that cause eye infections.
